Loading.Title: Loading analysis
Loading.Description: Checking the selected product against your saved allergen profile...

Error.Title: Analysis unavailable
Error.Description: We could not analyze this product right now. Please try another item or try again.

Offline.Title: Offline fallback
Offline.Description: Showing your last saved analysis for this product while the network is unavailable.

Contains.Title: This product is not safe for your profile.
Contains.Description: Confirmed allergen matches were found in the available product data.

MayContain.Title: Use caution before buying.
MayContain.Description: The product carries at least one trace warning for your selected allergens.

Safe.Title: Safe to enjoy.
Safe.Description: No selected allergens were detected in the available product data.

Unknown.Title: We need more product data.
Unknown.Description: The app could not complete a confident analysis for this product yet.

IngredientReview.NoMatches: No highlighted ingredient matches were returned for your selected allergens.

Loading.Title: Resolving scan
Loading.Description: Searching for the scanned barcode and checking whether detailed allergen data is available...

Error.Title: Scan unavailable
Error.Description: We could not resolve this scan right now. Please try again or search manually.

NotFound.Title: We could not match this barcode yet.
NotFound.Description: Try scanning again in better light, or use search to find the product manually.

Unverified.Title: We found a likely product match, but the barcode could not be verified.
Unverified.Message: This scan only found a search-based match, so the allergen status stays unknown.
Unverified.NextAction: Search manually or check the package label before relying on this result.

Basic.Title: We found the product, but not the detailed allergen data.
Basic.NextAction: Search manually or try another scan if you need a product with detailed allergen data.
